headlines.title: Trump to drop controversial 'anti-weaponization' fund
headlines.description: President Trump is expected to make an announcement about plans to drop the Justice Department's "anti-weaponization" fund. NBC News' Melanie Zanona has details on the backlash the fund has faced on Capitol Hill.

headlines.title: Iranian media: Tehran suspends U.S. peace talks over Israeli attacks in Lebanon
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told NBC News’ Garrett Haake he had not been informed of Iran suspending peace talks with the U.S. which was reported by Iranian state media. NBC News’ Monica Alba reports on how the president reacted and if the U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will be affected.

headlines.title: Anthropic files for IPO before OpenAI as trillion-dollar startups race to go public
headlines.description: Anthropic said it filed for an initial public stock offering, a surprise start in its race with OpenAI to be the next trillion-dollar AI startup to go public.

headlines.title: Florida sues OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, accusing them of putting profit over safety
headlines.description: Florida’s attorney general filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and the company’s CEO, saying the company misrepresents safety to turn a profit.

headlines.title: Around 1 in 5 young people use AI chatbots for mental health advice, survey finds
headlines.description: Nearly 1 in 5 adolescents and young adults are turning to AI chatbots for advice when they’re sad, angry, nervous or stressed, according to a new study.

headlines.title: How shoppers who pay in cash are subsidizing Americans’ credit card reward points
headlines.description: A Harvard study estimates that people who pay with cash and debit cards are subsidizing $30 billion a year in points and perks for credit card users.

headlines.title: How much does it cost to go to a World Cup game? We did the math
headlines.description: If you want to attend one of the opening matches of the upcoming FIFA World Cup, hotels and tickets are still widely available. But it’s going to cost you.

headlines.title: Democrats think their secret sauce in 2026 is targeting Trump and GOP on ‘corruption’
headlines.description: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro decried corruption during his primary night address to supporters in Bucks County last month.

headlines.title: Brazil and Italy rule out Ebola in previously suspected cases
headlines.description: The World Health Organization’s top doctor traveled to the epicenter of the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo over the weekend, as suspected cases and deaths continue to mount.

headlines.title: A personalized vaccine for melanoma cut the risk of cancer returning after five years
headlines.description: An experimental vaccine from Moderna and Merck shows promise in keeping deadly skin cancer from returning for years, according to new clinical trial results.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: 30 gallons of fuel spilled on National Mall after event for America’s 250th birthday
headlines.description: WASHINGTON – More than 30 gallons of fuel spilled onto the National Mall from generators that were used during a recent event celebrating America’s 250th anniversary that was organized by Freedom 250, a group created by the Trump administration, according to three people familiar with the matter
